items: AI can improve productivity. However, it may create new risks.
AI can improve productivity. However, it may create new risks.
AI can improve productivity. (however) it may create new risks.
AI can improve productivity. It may create new risks.
Sleep improves memory. Therefore, students should value sleep.
Sleep improves memory. Therefore, students should value sleep.
Sleep improves memory. (therefore) students should value sleep.
Sleep improves memory. Students should value sleep.
She stayed home because she was sick.
She stayed home because she was sick.
She stayed home (because) she was sick.
She was sick. She stayed home.
Many animals migrate. For example, some birds travel thousands of kilometers.
Many animals migrate. For example, some birds travel thousands of kilometers.
Many animals migrate. (for example) some birds travel thousands of kilometers.
Many animals migrate. Some birds travel thousands of kilometers.
According to the report, renewable energy use is increasing.
According to the report, renewable energy use is increasing.
(According to the report), renewable energy use is increasing.
The report says renewable energy use is increasing.
We need to consider both the benefits and the risks.
We need to consider both the benefits and the risks.
We need to (consider) both the benefits and the risks.
There are benefits and risks. We need to make a judgment.
Scientists define biodiversity as the variety of life in an ecosystem.
Scientists define biodiversity as the variety of life in an ecosystem.
Scientists (define) biodiversity as the variety of life in an ecosystem.
Biodiversity means the variety of life in an ecosystem.
